title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk, but its widespread adoption could lead to potential misuse by attackers to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. Additionally, reliance on the tool without proper validation may result in false positives or missed vulnerabilities.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment before integrating it into production workflows.
Ensure that any identified vulnerabilities are validated and patched using a comprehensive vulnerability management process.
Monitor for updates or security advisories related to the tool to address potential flaws or misuse.

title: A weakness has been identified in frdel/agent0ai agent-zero 0.9.7. This affects the function...
description: A weakness has been identified in frdel/agent0ai agent-zero 0.9.7. This affects the function handle_pdf_document of the file python/helpers/document_query.py. This manipulation causes server-side request forgery. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4308.

title: All versions of the package sjcl are vulnerable to Improper Verification of Cryptographic...
description: All versions of the package sjcl are vulnerable to Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature due to missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey(). An attacker can recover a victim's ECDH private key by sending crafted off-curve public keys and observing ECDH outputs. The dhJavaEc() function directly returns the raw x-coordinate of the scalar multiplication result (no hashing), providing a plaintext oracle without requiring any decryption feedback.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the sjcl package allows attackers to exploit improper verification of cryptographic signatures, potentially leading to the compromise of ECDH private keys. This could result in unauthorized access to encrypted communications, data breaches, or further exploitation of sensitive systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched or alternative cryptographic library that includes proper point-on-curve validation for ECDH operations.
Conduct a thorough audit of all systems and applications using the sjcl library to identify potential exposure and mitigate risks.
Implement additional monitoring and logging for cryptographic operations to detect any anomalous behavior or exploitation attempts.

title: The Royal Addons for Elementor – Addons and Templates Kit for Elementor plugin for WordPress is...
description: The Royal Addons for Elementor – Addons and Templates Kit for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.1049 via the get_main_query_args() function due to insufficient restrictions on which posts can be included. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to extract contents of non-public custom post types, such as Contact Form 7 submissions or WooCommerce coupons.

title: A flaw was found in libucl. A remote attacker could exploit this by providing a specially crafted...
description: A flaw was found in libucl. A remote attacker could exploit this by providing a specially crafted Universal Configuration Language (UCL) input that contains a key with an embedded null byte. This can cause a segmentation fault (SEGV fault) in the `ucl_object_emit` function when parsing and emitting the object, leading to a Denial of Service (DoS) for the affected system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in libucl allows remote attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) by exploiting a segmentation fault via a specially crafted UCL input. This could disrupt services relying on libucl for configuration parsing and processing.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update for libucl as soon as it is available from the vendor or maintainers.
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent maliciously crafted UCL inputs from being processed.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or crashes related to libucl and ensure robust logging is in place for debugging and incident response.

title: The WowStore – Store Builder & Product Blocks for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable...
description: The WowStore – Store Builder & Product Blocks for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the ‘search’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.4.3 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query.  This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-2579.

This product takes the approach of rolling

title: A security flaw has been discovered in Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform 7.17.0. The...

title: YAML::Syck versions through 1.36 for Perl has several potential security vulnerabilities...
description:
YAML::Syck versions through 1.36 for Perl has several potential security vulnerabilities including a high-severity heap buffer overflow in the YAML emitter.

The heap overflow occurs when class names exceed the initial 512-byte allocation.

The base64 decoder could read past the buffer end on trailing newlines.

strtok mutated n->type_id in place, corrupting shared node data.

A memory leak occurred in syck_hdlr_add_anchor when a node already had an anchor. The incoming anchor string 'a' was lea

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform up to 7...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform up to 7.17.0. This affects an unknown function of the file /rest/preSetTemplate/getRecByTemplateId. The manipulation of the argument ID leads to sql injection. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit SQL injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database manipulation, or complete system compromise. The public disclosure increases the likelihood of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization to the 'ID' parameter to mitigate SQL injection risks.
Isolate the Tiandy Easy7 platform from the internet or untrusted networks until a patch is available.
Contact the vendor for updates or consider migrating to an alternative platform if no response is received.

title: Buffalo TeraStation NAS TS5400R firmware version 4.02-0.06 and prior contain an excessive file...
description: Buffalo TeraStation NAS TS5400R firmware version 4.02-0.06 and prior contain an excessive file permissions vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to read the /etc/shadow file by uploading and executing a PHP file through the webserver. Attackers can exploit world-readable permissions on /etc/shadow to retrieve hashed passwords for all configured accounts including root.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to access sensitive system files, including /etc/shadow, which contains hashed passwords for all accounts. This could lead to privilege escalation, unauthorized access, and compromise of the NAS device and its stored data.
recommended_actions: Update the Buffalo TeraStation NAS firmware to the latest version that addresses this vulnerability.
Restrict access to the NAS device's webserver to trusted IP addresses and implement strong authentication mechanisms.
Perform regular audits of user accounts and permissions to ensure no unauthorized access or misconfigurations.

title: An Incorrect Access Control vulnerability exists in INDEX-EDUCATION PRONOTE prior to 2025.2.8....
description: An Incorrect Access Control vulnerability exists in INDEX-EDUCATION PRONOTE prior to 2025.2.8. The affected components (index.js and composeUrlImgPhotoIndividu) allow the construction of direct URLs to user profile images based solely on predictable identifiers such as user IDs and names. Due to missing authorization checks and lack of rate-limiting when generating or accessing these URLs, an unauthenticated or unauthorized actor may retrieve profile pictures of users by crafting requests with g

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthorized actors to access user profile images by exploiting predictable identifiers and missing authorization checks. This could lead to privacy violations, reputational damage, and potential misuse of personal information.
recommended_actions: Update INDEX-EDUCATION PRONOTE to version 2025.2.8 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement stricter access control mechanisms and authorization checks for sensitive resources such as user profile images.
Enable rate-limiting to prevent brute-force or automated exploitation of predictable identifiers.

description: The `flow/admin/moniteur.php` script in Use It Flow administration website before 10.0.0 is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution. When handling GET requests, the script takes user-supplied input from the `action` URL parameter, performs insufficient validation, and incorporates this input into a string that is subsequently executed by the `eval()` function. title: CVE-2026-28691 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, an uninitialized pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the JBIG decoder due to a missing check. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The uninitialized pointer dereference vulnerability in the JBIG decoder of ImageMagick could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code, cause denial of service, or compromise systems that process maliciously crafted JBIG files. This poses a significant risk to systems relying on ImageMagick for image processing.
recommended_actions: Upgrade ImageMagick to versions 7.1.2-16 or 6.9.13-41 immediately to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for image files processed by ImageMagick.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection mechanisms to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-28494 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, a stack buffer overflow exists in ImageMagick's morphology kernel parsing functions. User-controlled kernel strings exceeding a buffer are copied into fixed-size stack buffers via memcpy without bounds checking, resulting in stack corruption. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28494.

title: CVE-2026-26982 - Ghostty is a cross-platform terminal emulator. Ghostty allows control characters such as 0x03 (Ctrl+
description: Ghostty is a cross-platform terminal emulator. Ghostty allows control characters such as 0x03 (Ctrl+C) in pasted and dropped text. These can be used to execute arbitrary commands in some shell environments. This attack requires an attacker to convince the user to copy and paste or drag and drop malicious text. The attack requires user interaction to be triggered, but the dangerous characters are invisible in most GUI environments so it isn't trivially detected, especially if the string contents are complex. Fixed in Ghostty v1.3.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-26982.

title: CVE-2026-1776 - Camaleon CMS versions 2.4.5.0 through 2.9.0, prior to commit f54a77e, contain a path traversal vulne
description: Camaleon CMS versions 2.4.5.0 through 2.9.0, prior to commit f54a77e, contain a path traversal vulnerability in the AWS S3 uploader implementation that allows authenticated users to read arbitrary files from the web server’s filesystem. The issue occurs in the download_private_file functionality when the application is configured to use the CamaleonCmsAwsUploader backend. Unlike the local uploader implementation, the AWS uploader does not validate file paths with valid_folder_path?, allowing directory traversal sequences to be supplied via the file parameter. As a result, any authenticated user, including low-privileged registered users, can access sensitive files such as /etc/passwd. This issue represents a bypass of the incomplete fix for CVE-2024-46987 and affects deployments using the AWS S3 storage backend.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1776.
